It's important to note though that while virtually every benzodiazepine produces metabolites, the extent and nature of those metabolites can vary widely between different classes within this group. However, given the diversity of benzodiazepines and their consistent behavior regarding metabolism under normal conditions, asserting that 'all' benzodiazepines produce metabolites remains valid for practical purposes in medicine.
